specific_question: In 2024, how many cost-recovery reports did the asset lifecycle management team submit for depreciated Elexion Automotive production assets?
answer: Internal finance records show that Olivia Martinez’s team filed 19 cost-recovery reports for depreciated production assets between January 1 and December 31, 2024.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
